div.p: Assembly Offset Macros Must match struct process exactly

⚠️ CRITICAL: PCB field offsets MUST match assembly macros exactly. Any mismatch will cause context switch to save/restore wrong data, leading to random crashes, register corruption, or triple faults. Always verify with: _Static_assert(offsetof(process_t, eax) == PCB_EAX, "...")
Saved Register State Offsets 0x30 - 0x57 (40 bytes) ★ MUST match assembly offsets exactly
★ Critical fields Must be correct for context switch
pid uint32_t Offset: 0x00-0x03 (4 bytes) Unique process identifier
name[32] char[32] Offset: 0x04-0x23 (32 bytes) Process name (null-terminated)
priority uint32_t Offset: 0x28-0x2B (4 bytes) Scheduling priority (future use)
time_slice uint32_t Offset: 0x2C-0x2F (4 bytes) Remaining ticks (10 = 100ms)
page_directory uint32_t Offset: 0x58-0x5B (4 bytes) Physical address of CR3 0 = use kernel's PD
kernel_stack uint32_t Offset: 0x5C-0x5F (4 bytes) ★ TSS.ESP0 for Ring 3→0
user_stack uint32_t Offset: 0x60-0x63 (4 bytes) User mode ESP
entry_point uint32_t Offset: 0x64-0x67 (4 bytes) Initial EIP for process
next process_t* Offset: 0x68-0x6B (4 bytes) Next process in list
prev process_t* Offset: 0x6C-0x6F (4 bytes) Previous process in list
